class.Artificer.description: A master of invention who uses ingenuity and magic to unlock extraordinary capabilities in objects.

class.Barbarian.description: A fierce warrior who can enter a battle rage.

class.Bard.description: An inspiring magician whose power echoes the music of creation.

class.Cleric.description: A priestly champion who wields divine magic in service of a higher power.

class.Druid.description: A priest of the Old Faith, wielding the powers of nature and adopting animal forms.

class.Fighter.description: A master of martial combat, skilled with a variety of weapons and armor.

class.Monk.description: A master of martial arts, harnessing the power of the body in pursuit of physical and spiritual perfection.

class.Paladin.description: A holy warrior bound to a sacred oath.

class.Ranger.description: A warrior who combats threats on the edges of civilization.

class.Rogue.description: A scoundrel who uses stealth and trickery to overcome obstacles and enemies.

class.Sorcerer.description: A spellcaster who draws on inherent magic from a gift or bloodline.

class.Warlock.description: A wielder of magic derived from a bargain with an extraplanar entity.

class.Wizard.description: A scholarly magic-user capable of manipulating the structures of reality.

species.Aasimar.description: Celestial-touched with healing hands and divine transformation.

species.Dragonborn.description: Dragon-kin with a breath weapon, damage resistance, and draconic flight.

species.Drow.description: Elves of the Underdark with superior darkvision and innate magic.

species.Dwarf.description: Resilient and tough, with poison resistance and stonecunning.

species.Forest Gnome.description: Small and cunning, with a knack for illusion and speaking with beasts.

species.Goliath.description: Towering giant-kin with powerful build and giant ancestry.

species.Halfling.description: Small, brave, and lucky, with natural stealth.

species.High Elf.description: Elves with arcane talent and a flexible wizard cantrip.

species.Human.description: Resourceful, skillful, and versatile — the most adaptable species.

species.Orc.description: Hardy and fierce, with adrenaline rush and relentless endurance.

species.Rock Gnome.description: Inventive and cunning, with tinker's magic.

species.Tiefling.description: Fiend-touched with Thaumaturgy. Choose a legacy for full traits.

species.Tiefling (Abyssal).description: Abyssal legacy: poison resistance, Poison Spray, Ray of Sickness, Hold Person.

species.Tiefling (Chthonic).description: Chthonic legacy: necrotic resistance, Chill Touch, False Life, Ray of Enfeeblement.

species.Tiefling (Infernal).description: Infernal legacy: fire resistance, Fire Bolt, Hellish Rebuke, Darkness.

species.Wood Elf.description: Fleet-footed elves with Druidcraft and woodland magic.

background.Acolyte.description: Temple servant with sacred rites. Feat: Magic Initiate (Cleric).

background.Artisan.description: Skilled craftsperson and guild member. Feat: Crafter.

background.Charlatan.description: Con artist with a silver tongue. Feat: Skilled.

background.Criminal.description: Experienced lawbreaker with underworld contacts. Feat: Alert.

background.Entertainer.description: Performer who thrives before an audience. Feat: Musician.

background.Farmer.description: Hardy worker of the land. Feat: Tough.

background.Guard.description: Trained sentinel who keeps watch. Feat: Alert.

background.Guide.description: Wilderness expert and pathfinder. Feat: Magic Initiate (Druid).

background.Hermit.description: Recluse who discovered a deep truth. Feat: Healer.

background.Merchant.description: Trader with a nose for profit. Feat: Lucky.

background.Noble.description: Aristocrat raised in wealth and privilege. Feat: Skilled.

background.Sage.description: Scholar devoted to learning. Feat: Magic Initiate (Wizard).

background.Sailor.description: Seafarer hardened by storms. Feat: Tavern Brawler.

background.Scribe.description: Keeper of records and lore. Feat: Skilled.

background.Soldier.description: Military veteran of rank and discipline. Feat: Savage Attacker.

background.Wayfarer.description: Wanderer who survives by luck and wits. Feat: Lucky.
